description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure, likely male, rendered in a pale, marble-like material. The figure stands upright on a rounded base, with one arm bent at the elbow and the other hanging more loosely by the side. The facial features are somewhat indistinct, but the head is clearly defined with visible hair texture. The surface of the sculpture appears slightly rough and unfinished in some areas, especially around the legs and base, suggesting either weathering or an intentionally raw artistic style. The overall form is naturalistic, with anatomical details such as the torso, limbs, and hands being proportionally represented. The sculpture is solid and monolithic, with no visible joints or separable parts.
description: A pale, marble-like sculpture of a standing human figure on a rounded base, with one arm bent and the other relaxed. The surface is slightly rough and the facial features are indistinct.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full figure, both arms, and the rounded base; facial features and torso are most visible.
description_view_1: Left side profile, highlighting the bent arm and the thickness of the figure; the head and base are seen in profile.
description_view_2: Rear or back-angled view, showing the back of the head, shoulders, and the less detailed rear of the legs and base.
description_view_3: Right side profile, with the relaxed arm more visible and the side of the torso and leg contours apparent.
attribute_location_context: No visible context or background; the setting is indeterminate from the images provided.
